title: SplitIT — Stripe ACH Automation
description:
A fintech-style automation platform built on Stripe ACH and Financial Connections. When income hits a user's US bank account, SplitIT detects it, applies user-defined rules, pulls funds via ACH Debit, and transfers the pieces to payee Stripe accounts — end-to-end, webhook-driven, fully audited.

Context: My first project at ATH, assigned as a temporary fintech engagement outside my core AI/ML scope. I took end-to-end ownership, delivered it, and that's what earned me the SINTRA assignment.

Not an ML project — but a demonstration that I can own the plumbing side of production systems. The same muscle that makes SINTRA's ETL pipeline reliable.
